known_limitations: CP-SAT objective redesign is not complete.
Local search still needs targeted neighborhoods and delta scoring.
Manual move/swap preview APIs are not complete.
Database migrations, stable UUID identity and safe re-import are not complete.
AI secret storage still needs keychain-backed implementation.
Real Windows display scaling screenshots still need manual capture.
